description: A coaching and self-development platform with desktop/web app for management and mobile PWA for mentees with daily exercise tracking.

userStories.title: Initialize Next.js Project with TypeScript
userStories.description: Set up Next.js 14 with App Router, TypeScript strict mode, ESLint, Prettier, and Tailwind CSS following Cerebro patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: Tailwind CSS configured with Twilight Studio theme colors
npm run dev starts without errors

userStories.title: Set Up PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
userStories.description: Configure PostgreSQL database connection and Drizzle ORM. Use docker-compose for local PostgreSQL on port 5434.

userStories.title: Create Keycloak Realm Bootstrap Script
userStories.description: Create bootstrap-keycloak.sh script that will create 'rdy' realm in shared Keycloak. Script should configure client and create roles: superadmin, admin, mentor, mentee. DO NOT execute the script - it will be run manually.
acceptanceCriteria: Client 'rdy-app' configured with proper redirect URIs
Roles created: superadmin, admin, mentor, mentee
Test users created for each role

userStories.title: Integrate Keycloak Authentication
userStories.description: Set up NextAuth v5 with Keycloak provider. Implement authentication configuration, login/logout flows, JWT validation, and role-based middleware.
acceptanceCriteria: NextAuth v5 configured with Keycloak provider
User info available in React context

userStories.title: Set Up tRPC with Type-Safe API
userStories.description: Configure tRPC v10 with base routers for tenants, users, classes, and exercises.
acceptanceCriteria: Base routers: tenants, users, classes, exercises

userStories.title: Install and Configure shadcn/ui
userStories.description: Set up shadcn/ui with Twilight Studio theme colors and install base components.
acceptanceCriteria: Base components installed: button, card, input, select, table, tabs, dialog, calendar
